Container.Name: OpenClaw
Container.Overview:
OpenClaw optimized Unraid template.
This template intentionally uses /mnt/cache appdata paths instead of /mnt/user to avoid Unraid shfs/FUSE latency for Node, SQLite, and plugin runtime dependency staging.
Recommended follow-up: run the companion one-button setup script to apply OpenClaw config optimizations, create the Browserless sidecar for browser tools, validate openclaw.json, and disable heavy/default-unused plugins.
Container.PostArgs: sh -c "mkdir -p /root/.openclaw /home/linuxbrew /tmp/openclaw-plugin-stage; [ -s /root/.openclaw/openclaw.json ] || echo '{\"gateway\":{\"mode\":\"local\",\"bind\":\"lan\",\"controlUi\":{\"allowInsecureAuth\":true},\"auth\":{\"mode\":\"token\"}},\"agents\":{\"defaults\":{\"model\":{\"primary\":\"openai-codex/gpt-5.5\"},\"memorySearch\":{\"provider\":\"openai\",\"model\":\"text-embedding-3-small\",\"enabled\":false}}},\"browser\":{\"enabled\":true,\"defaultProfile\":\"browserless\",\"headless\":true,\"remoteCdpTimeoutMs\":3000,\"remoteCdpHandshakeTimeoutMs\":6000,\"snapshotDefaults\":{\"mode\":\"efficient\"},\"profiles\":{\"browserless\":{\"cdpUrl\":\"ws://172.28.238.10:3000\",\"color\":\"#00AA00\"}}},\"tools\":{\"alsoAllow\":[\"browser\"]}}' > /root/.openclaw/openclaw.json; exec node dist/index.js gateway --bind lan"

Config.Name: Control UI Port
Config.Description: Port for Control UI and Gateway API.

Config.Name: Config Path
Config.Description: OpenClaw config, credentials, sessions, and runtime state. Use /mnt/cache, not /mnt/user.

Config.Name: Projects Path
Config.Description: Optional additional path for coding projects. Use /mnt/cache, not /mnt/user.

Config.Name: Homebrew Path
Config.Description: Persistent storage for optional Homebrew packages. Use /mnt/cache, not /mnt/user.

Config.Name: Gateway Token
Config.Description: Secret token for Control UI authentication. Generate with: openssl rand -hex 24

Config.Name: OpenAI API Key
Config.Description: Optional. Needed for OpenAI embeddings/API features. Codex subscription auth is configured separately via openai-codex OAuth.

Config.Name: Telegram Bot Token
Config.Description: Optional Telegram bot token from BotFather.

Config.Name: Gateway Port
Config.Description: Internal gateway port. Keep in sync with Control UI Port.

Config.Name: Plugin Stage Dir
Config.Description: Writable non-shfs directory for bundled plugin runtime dependencies. Required to avoid Unraid shfs/FUSE startup hangs.
